page_content: How are you all? So today's video is going to be very important for you all. And after watching this video, you will also think that this is going to happen. I have heard news, there is confirmation that the new sector companies are going to increase their sector prices very soon. I have made a small reel of this and I had put it on Instagram and Facebook. But I will tell our YouTubers for viewers that these things are going to happen and the farmers... I know that the situation of farmers is not good in India and due to the lack of good situation, poor farmers buy loans, buy tractors and now this situation is being made and this time in the fall, a lot of things happened that fell down, it rained and after it rained, a lot of crops were destroyed. But after the crops were destroyed, a lot of tractor companies have done something. The first company is Scott Kubota Group, in which you will know that the power track of farmers, and the price of farm track will increase by 15 days and the price increment will be according to every variant. It will increase by 35 Hp Tractor and it will increase by 40 Hp Tractor and it will increase by 50 Hp Tractor. The company is saying that the raw material that is coming is expensive. The reason for the price is that the war in Middle East, Iran, America, Israel, because of that, many things have come up, many things have come up, companies are saying that. But my belief is that the war has ended once, as I know. If the company increases the price once, then it will increase. If the things are cheap, then it is possible that I know that the price of the farm is increased, but when the price is cheap, then the companies will not decrease the price. Similarly, Swaraj has also been heard that Swaraj company is also going to increase the price of tractor in the 21st. So, as I am against farmers, I did not understand this. At least the companies had to hold things because this time the farmers' crops have not been very good. You must have seen that this time it has been raining a lot and still you must have seen that it has been raining a lot in Uttar Pradesh because of which a lot of people have lost their crops and many things have happened. The need for a tractor to buy is necessary and the farmer does not buy for the sake of his liking. Our country has a lot of crops and many things, so the tractor buys so that the farmer can help in the development of our country. So, I am against that the companies should listen to me and try not to increase the price. If it is necessary, then they cannot say anything, but if the farmer is planning a tractor like the one of Scott Kubota or if he is planning to buy a Swaraj brand tractor, then some people will comment that the companies are saying that they should buy a Delhi tractor. They do not want to do this at all. If you do not believe me, then you should go to the companies and ask them whether it is true or not. Apart from that, I have heard a lot of companies, I have heard that the price is also going to increase. Apart from that, I have also heard that the price of the companies is going to increase. You will know how much it will increase. So, I am telling you that the biggest thing in our country is that the farmers should be with the people. And for them, the companies should be a little bit more careful because the situation is not right. And for the farmers, the tractor is necessary. They do not want to buy a tractor. So, the companies should wait a little bit and see the situation and then increase the price. So, farmers, how did you like the video? Do tell us. That is all for today. See you in the next video. Thank you very much for watching. Good bye.

Escorts Kubota Launches Powertrac Shaurya, a Tractor Series for Southern India's Paddy Sector
The five-variant range, spanning 39 HP to 52 HP, is the Powertrac brand's first product line designed for paddy and wetland farming in Southern India.

Escorts Kubota Limited launched the Powertrac Shaurya tractor series on Tuesday, marking the first time the company has introduced a dedicated paddy and wetland-focused range under its Powertrac brand. The series, comprising five variants across the 39 HP to 52 HP range, is targeted at paddy-growing regions including Telangana, Andhra Pradesh, Tamil Nadu and Karnataka.

The company said the tractors will be available through authorised Powertrac dealerships in Southern India.

Escorts Kubota operates three tractor brands in India — Kubota, Farmtrac and Powertrac — serving the premium, entry-premium and value segments, respectively. The Shaurya series sits within the Powertrac portfolio, which caters to the company's value and mass market customers.

The tractors have been engineered for operation in waterlogged and wetland field conditions. Key features include cassette-type sealing across major components to prevent water and mud ingress, a turning radius of 3.1 metres for use in small and medium-sized fields, and a fully constant mesh gearbox with 8 forward and 2 reverse gears.

The series offers Sensi-1 hydraulic lift with a capacity range of 1,600 to 2,000 kg, depending on the variant. An independent PTO lever with double clutch supports implement control, and dual PTO options — 540/1000 rpm and reverse PTO — are available for a range of paddy applications. 

Nikhil Nanda, Chairman and Managing Director, said the launch aligned with the company's objective of deepening its presence in paddy markets through application-specific products. Akira Kato, Deputy Managing Director, noted that product development for the series began with field conditions rather than standard platforms. Bharat Madan, Whole-time Director and CFO, said the product would improve the regional composition of the company's tractor portfolio.

We have to plough the soya beans. Many people will plough the wheat with water. And in such a way, the temperature is 45 degrees. People have said that this year, it may be 50 degrees. Now, I will talk about the purpose of this video. My purpose is that, is India's company not thinking about AC K-Bin for our farmers? Now, you will say that AC K-Bin is coming. It is coming. But AC K-Bin is still coming. In the tractor above 55 HP. You are an average person. The most tractor sales in India are from 39 HP to 50 HP. If in India, every year, sorry, every month, 70-80 thousand tractors are sold from 39 HP to 50 HP. If we talk about that, 10,000, 11,000, 50 HP tractors are sold. Now, let's talk about AC K-Bin. How much is the price? It is 16 lakhs. It is 21 lakhs. So, the farmers of our country do not have the courage to spend 14, 15, 21 lakhs on AC K-Bin. And sit and relax. So, I have taken a step towards this. I would like to tell you that, as I told you that, I went to Mehdra plant and there was a discussion with Mehdra's marketing head. You should ask, how long will we stay on AC K-Bin for foreign companies? Can't AC K-Bin be made in our country? So, he said, sir, why can't it be made? We are also working. Then I asked, what are you working on? He did not say that, sir, we are working on 75 HP, 60 HP. Then I said, how much will you sell by working on the HP tractors? Sir, our farmer is, I am saying again, that more people buy tractors of more than 50 HP. I gave a suggestion, that you make a tractor of 45 HP like this, AC K-Bin, which you can use on AC K-Bin, that too cheap. Now, it is not that you should use it very expensively. Sir, what does a farmer want? He wants a soil-saving soil. Because when he does rotabitter, I have seen that soil goes directly into his eyes. Apart from that, farmers, when it rains, they also take care of our farmers. That is also a very dangerous thing for them. You do not sell tractors in the field, how much will you sell them? title: आ गई Powertrac Shaurya Series साउथ इंडिया कस्टमर के लिए | Paddy Special Tractor | Powertrac Shaurya
description:
#powertrac 
Escorts Kubota Launches Powertrac Shaurya, a Tractor Series for Southern India's Paddy Sector
The five-variant range, spanning 39 HP to 52 HP, is the Powertrac brand's first product line designed for paddy and wetland farming in Southern India.

Escorts Kubota Limited launched the Powertrac Shaurya tractor series on Tuesday, marking the first time the company has introduced a dedicated paddy and wetland-focused range under its Powertrac brand. The series, comprising five variants across the 39 HP to 52 HP range, is targeted at paddy-growing regions including Telangana, Andhra Pradesh, Tamil Nadu and Karnataka.

The company said the tractors will be available through authorised Powertrac dealerships in Southern India.

Escorts Kubota operates three tractor brands in India — Kubota, Farmtrac and Powertrac — serving the premium, entry-premium and value segments, respectively. The Shaurya series sits within the Powertrac portfolio, which caters to the company's value and mass market customers.

The tractors have been engineered for operation in waterlogged and wetland field conditions. Key features include cassette-type sealing across major components to prevent water and mud ingress, a turning radius of 3.1 metres for use in small and medium-sized fields, and a fully constant mesh gearbox with 8 forward and 2 reverse gears.

The series offers Sensi-1 hydraulic lift with a capacity range of 1,600 to 2,000 kg, depending on the variant. An independent PTO lever with double clutch supports implement control, and dual PTO options — 540/1000 rpm and reverse PTO — are available for a range of paddy applications. A perforated elevated platform, protected wiring harness routing inside the fender channel, and an adjustable slider seat with anti-slip pads are also included.

Nikhil Nanda, Chairman and Managing Director, said the launch aligned with the company's objective of deepening its presence in paddy markets through application-specific products. Akira Kato, Deputy Managing Director, noted that product development for the series began with field conditions rather than standard platforms. Bharat Madan, Whole-time Director and CFO, said the product would improve the regional composition of the company's tractor portfolio.

इस वीडियो में हमने 2019 मॉडल Sonalika Tractor का REAL FIELD DIESEL TEST किया है। ट्रैक्टर को 22 Disc Harrow के साथ बालू रेत (Sandy Soil) में चलाकर पूरा 1 Acre खेत तैयार किया गया और सटीक तरीके से डीजल मापा गया।

इस टेस्ट में ट्रैक्टर को High 2nd Gear और लगभग 1500 RPM पर चलाया गया। खेत की मिट्टी बालू रेत होने के कारण स्लिपेज भी ज्यादा था, कई जगह ब्रेक लगाकर मोड़ना पड़ा, फिर भी ट्रैक्टर ने शानदार प्रदर्शन किया।

Test Highlights:

✅ Tractor Model: Sonalika 2019 Model
✅ Implement: 22 Disc Harrow
✅ Soil Type: Sandy Soil (Balu Ret)
✅ Gear Used: High 2nd Gear
✅ RPM: 1500 RPM
✅ Area Covered: 1 Acre
✅ Time Taken: Around 17 Minutes
✅ Diesel Consumed: Only 1.99 Litres
✅ Real Farmer Feedback
✅ Actual Field Conditions

बहुत से लोग कहते हैं कि पुराना Sonalika माइलेज नहीं देता, लेकिन इस वीडियो में आपको Ground Reality देखने को मिलेगी।

.🚜 Swaraj 855 FE 2021 Model Tractor Review After 3200 Hours | Real Farmer Feedback

Dosto aaj ki is video mein hum lekar aaye hain Swaraj 855 FE 2021 Model tractor ka long term review. Is tractor ko lagbhag 3200+ hours chalaya ja chuka hai aur aaj owner se jaanenge ki 5 saal ke istemal ke baad tractor mein kya-kya maintenance aayi, diesel average kaisi rahi, koi leakage ya engine problem aayi ya nahi aur overall tractor ka performance kaisa raha.

Video mein tractor owner Vijay Pal ji ne apna real experience share kiya hai. Unke mutabik tractor ne 5 saal mein koi badi technical problem nahi di. Sirf normal maintenance jaise tyre puncture, fuse replacement aur regular servicing karni padi. Engine, gearbox aur hydraulic system mein kisi prakar ki badi dikkat dekhne ko nahi mili.

Owner ke hisab se Swaraj tractor ki sabse badi khasiyat iska simple design aur aasani se milne wale spare parts hain. Gaon ki market mein bhi iske spare parts aasani se mil jaate hain aur emergency mein local parts se bhi kaam chal jata hai.

Video mein sensing system ki ek kami bhi discuss ki gayi hai jiska owner ne khud solution nikala hai. Iske alawa tractor ko rust free aur leakage free rakhne ke liye maintenance tips bhi share ki gayi hain.

Agar aap Swaraj 855 FE, Swaraj 744 FE, Swaraj 834 XM ya kisi bhi Swaraj tractor ko kharidne ki planning kar rahe hain to yeh video aapke liye bahut useful sabit hogi.

✅ Real Farmer Feedback
✅ 3200 Hours Ownership Review
✅ Diesel Consumption Discussion
✅ Maintenance Cost Experience
✅ Spare Parts Availability
✅ Hydraulic Sensing Discussion
✅ Tractor Cleaning & Rust Prevention Tips

Tractor Specifications (Approx.)

• Engine Power: 50-55 HP Category
• Engine Type: 3 Cylinder Diesel Engine
• PTO Power: Approx 42-45 HP
• Gearbox: Side Shift Transmission
• Hydraulic Lifting Capacity: Around 1700-2000 Kg
• Fuel Tank Capacity: Approx 60 Litres
• Suitable Implements:

* Super Seeder
* Straw Reaper
* Rotavator
* Cultivator
* Disc Harrow
* Trolley
* Seed Drill

title: किसान का कमाल: 15 साल पुराने ट्रैक्टर में फिट की टर्बो और 16 के टायर | Modified New Holland 3630
description:
Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCY1z8LEc9zaqoSi2KVcZ2uQ/joinEnglish Description:
In this video, we meet Sukhbir Ji from Rakhi Khas, who has completely transformed his 2011 model New Holland 3630. Despite being 15 years old, this tractor performs better than many new models. The owner has personally modified it by installing a Turbocharger, converting it to Power Steering, and upgrading the tyres from 14-inch to 16-inch for better grip and power. We take a deep dive into its performance on the field with an 11-tine cultivator and check its fuel efficiency and sensing power. Watch how a farmer’s passion can turn an old machine into a high-performance beast!

page_content: In the P40HP and P55HP tractors, there is only 10 HP difference. But on the ground, this difference changes the speed, the fuel consumption, and the output. So if you want to choose the right tractor for your farm, then you should not take a tractor with just power. So in today's video, we will talk about Kubota MU-401 and Kubota MU-501. And we will understand which tractor is better in the outside fields. Hello everybody, you are watching Head Tractor Junction, where you get all the information related to tractors and farming. So don't forget to subscribe to the channel for such informative videos. So let's start with the basic difference. Kubota MU-401 is a 40 HP tractor, while Kubota MU-501 comes with 55 HP power. In both the tractors, you get 4-cylinder engines of 24-34 cc. But when it comes to real work, the difference in power is clearly felt. In simple words, the MU-501 is made for daily farming and the MU-501 is for heavy work. After the performance, the Torque of MU-401 is approximately 113 Nm and can lift up to 1640 kg. For small and medium farms, the MU-401 is a balanced option. Because it is fuel efficient, speedy, and maintenance-manageable. On the other hand, the MU-510 is more suitable for large farms and commercial work. Where the heavy-duty work is shared daily. Price is also an important role in decision making. page_content: Greetings, Mr. Kisan. I am Arjun from Tractor Junction. And I am here in Telangana. And today we are going to meet a great power, who is the director of New Holland Marketing. Let's meet him. And let's know about the launch of Tractor Saajlon. Sir, welcome to Tractor Junction. Thank you. Sir, the first question I have for you is, that should I talk from the perspective of New Holland, the Indian farmers, what is the plan for a long term? And how does it work? We are a brand of New Holland Complete Farm Solutions. We provide a variety of solutions for agriculture and farming. Our entire tractor portfolio is there. And our daily portfolio is there. There are our combined harvester, sugarcane harvester, porridge harvester. So we provide the entire portfolio. We provide a complete solution for farming. The tractor used with more implementation, is beyond harvesting, post harvesting. We provide the entire portfolio for that too. So we are the partner of the farmer. We work for the profitability and productivity of the farmer. And this is our goal, to keep the country in the brink of collapse. What are the things beyond the price, that you pay attention to for farmers and farmers? The price is a first thing that comes to mind. Before that, we have to see how the farmer is soiled, how he is crop, how to implement that soil. That is the matching of the tractor with the horse power. We should look at two types of farming. One is how much is the horse power of the tractor, the other is how much is the PTO power. Because if the PTO is an application and PTO is an implement, then it becomes very important. Then how much is the lift capacity? How to implement it, so that it gets the correct lift capacity? Sir, we are standing on the land of Telangana. And I can see all these tractors here. 32, 35, 40, 10 and 3600. So sir, for this, as I was talking about, the paddy field, basically, the field of harvest is also planted. We will show you because, in North India, there is no harvest. Now the crop is being harvested, but here it is planted. So sir, for the paddy field, because specially, if you design for that, then what things are taken care of? And the farmers here, if they are watching, what message do they want to give? First, these tractors are standing here. Yes. Look, for paddy fields, it is very important that there is no water seepage of the transmission. So our paddy special is a double metal-based sealing tractor. Second is ground clearance. You can understand the ground clearance, that it is closed, there is water in front of it. So ground clearance should be correct. So there is a portal axle in which there is additional ground clearance. It is very good. We have tried it, tested it and launched it. So all these things, obviously, if you want to reverse the front and the back, then we give the option of the shuttle in tractors. If you want to buy it, the shuttle product is also available. So it is very important because when it goes into paddling, it is very important to reverse it because it has to come out of the water. It cannot be lost because of the small field. So all these special features are in our tractor. We have tested them on the terrain of Telangana. We have proved them. We always test them with the farmers. And only then we bring the product to the market. Sir, there is one more thing, I will be able to add in this. As I was talking about, what I saw was that it is only focused on paddling. But overall, it is absolutely correct. Absolutely correct. So if you have an application for dry land in the field of year, in the coming season, when there is no rainy season, when paddling is not happening, then this will also work. It will work very well. The special additional features given for paddling are above that. It is above. Sir, there is one more thing. Suppose, what we are seeing here, and many people are going to purchase it, after purchasing, if you tell us a little about the services, give us a brief, people will like it. The service is very important. Tractor is a machine that runs in the field. It is very harsh. Sometimes it can be called abuse. It can be abuse. So, the duration of the tractor and after that, maintenance is necessary. So, after selling the tractor, we install the tractor in a month. Where our technician goes to the farmer's house, to give the entire information of the tractor, in every way, there is an application, how to apply, how to lift, which gear lever to use, everyone explains it. There is an installation of the whole day. After that, we track this tractor very closely. When it is registered in the warranty, after that we track it, the customer is calling that the tractor is running properly. It is called first service. We give a 6 year warranty, that is why we give it so that the farmer is not worried for 6 years. That this is a warranty on the tractor, and everything will be fine. If there is any problem, I can go to the workshop, go to the company's dealership and make it correct. This is a very good thing. Sir, one last thing. If you want to give a message to the people who are watching you, who are watching the farmer, or the dealers, if they use a tractor in any way, if you want to give a message for them. See, I will give the message that the tractor should be used, which is right for you according to the application. First, understand what is your soil type, which implement you want to use with the tractor. And the usage and application of the tractor, according to that, you have bought the tractor. You will benefit from that, so that you can spend the right amount on the tractor. And if you have bought New Holland, then you will know that along with performance and power, the consumption of fuel, diesel fuel consumption is also the lowest in New Holland. So in this matter, our tractor is very good. Try it. There is no shortage in the product portfolio. We make the tractor of 120 horsepower to 105 horsepower in India. We have tractor available in every range of 4-5 HP. It has been done for the paddy, for the dry land application, for the mixed application. Or for the small tractor orchard or for the inter-gultivation. We have all kinds of portfolios available. Farming is so important in India. Farming community is so important. It also gives us a lot of respect for our contribution. Thank you very much. So friends, what do you want to say? Do let us know in the comments. If you want to ask anything, do ask that too. Because next time, I will definitely talk to you about it. And your comments, because last time, I had made a video with Isar. So I have asked some questions today. But next time definitely I will ask. So please comment. Subscribe to the channel and stay with us. Thank you very much.

title: Why Escorts Kubota Built the Shaurya Tractor Specifically for South Indian Farmers
description:
Why Escorts Kubota Built the Shaurya Tractor Specifically for South Indian Farmers | Tractor Junction

Escorts Kubota has launched the all-new Powertrac Shaurya Tractor Series, a purpose-built, farmer-first machine designed specifically to meet the unique agricultural needs of South India. In this exclusive interview and launch breakdown, Tractor Junction covers EVERYTHING you need to know

00:00 – Introduction and the four pillars of the Shaurya series.
01:10 – The "Farmer First" philosophy and core fundamentals.
01:58 – Targeting the South Indian paddy and rice markets.
02:52 – Key features: engine productivity, turning radius, and wetland suitability.
04:16 – Reliability and waterproof sealing for mud and water applications.
05:44 – Versatility beyond paddy farming (Independent PTO and Baler applications).
06:33 – The 3-year R&D and testing process in AP, Telangana, and Karnataka.
07:27 – Expansion plans for Chhattisgarh, Odisha, and West Bengal.
07:56 – Service network and the commitment to "doorstep service."
09:22 – Why the Shaurya series was launched under the Powertrac brand.
10:45 – Balancing affordability with high-end performance.
11:55 – Growth vision and making Powertrac a pan-India brand.
12:37 – The "Hyper-Local" product strategy for the next 12 months.
13:10 – The meaning of "Shaurya" (Courage) and a final message to farmers.

ABOUT POWERTRAC SHAURYA:

The Powertrac Shaurya series is Escorts Kubota's answer to the distinct farming requirements of South Indian agriculture from paddy fields to diverse crop cultivation. Built with a farmer-first philosophy, Shaurya combines robust performance, regional suitability, and accessible pricing to empower Indian farmers.

B2741. New Launched Kubota Mini Tractor NeoStar B2741S-N is a 27HP specially designed for grapes farming, orchard farming. ✅ 27HP Powerful Kubota Engine
✅ 750 Kg Lifting Capacity
✅ Narrow Track Design
✅ Flat Platform

If you are looking for the best narrow tractor for vineyard farming, grapes farming, orchard farming or intercultural operations, Kubota NeoStar B2741S-N can be a great choice.

description:
Kubota India has officially launched the new NeoStar Series mini tractors in India. These 21-30 HP tractors are Kubota A211S-N 21HP, Kubota B2441S-N 24HP, and Kubota B2741S-N 27HP tractor models. In this video, we will cover all the newly launched Kubota compact and narrow tractors

These new Kubota NeoStar tractors are specially designed for orchard farming, vineyard farming, sugarcane farming, intercrop farming, and narrow field applications. Kubota has added powerful features like power steering, eco PTO, compact size, fuel efficiency, and Japanese technology for Indian farmers. #kubota #kubotatractor #neostar #minitractor #compacttractor #narrowtractor #kubotaindia #tractors

description:
नमस्कार किसान भाइयों,

Kubota ने नाशिक में अपनी नई NeoStar Series लॉन्च कर दी है। इस नई सीरीज में A211S, A211S-N, B2441S, B2441S-N, B2741S और B2741S-N जैसे कॉम्पैक्ट और दमदार ट्रैक्टर शामिल हैं।

यह ट्रैक्टर खासतौर पर बागवानी, वाइनयार्ड (अंगूर की खेती), गन्ना खेती और इंटरकल्टीवेशन फार्मिंग को ध्यान में रखकर डिजाइन किए गए हैं।

इस वीडियो में जानिए:

✅ Kubota NeoStar Series के नए मॉडल
✅ E-TVCS इंजन की खासियत
✅ 2.1 मीटर का शॉर्टेस्ट टर्निंग रेडियस
✅ 2.98 फीट की नैरो चौड़ाई
✅ 4WD ड्राइव सिस्टम
✅ Engine Key Stop फीचर
✅ ECO PTO 540 और 750 RPM
✅ 750 किलोग्राम लिफ्टिंग क्षमता
✅ 9 फॉरवर्ड + 3 रिवर्स गियर
✅ 5 साल की वारंटी

क्या Kubota की नई NeoStar Series बागवानी और गन्ना किसानों के लिए गेम चेंजर साबित होगी? पूरी जानकारी के लिए वीडियो अंत तक जरूर देखें।

page_content: Hello farmers! We are in Nashik today where Kubota has launched their new and amazing Neo Star series. In this special launch event, Kubota has presented such compact and powerful tractors which are specially designed to keep the Bhagwani, vineyard, sugarcane and inter cultivation farming in mind. So let's see what is special about the farmers in this series. Watch the video till the end and subscribe to the Khetigadi YouTube channel and press the bell icon for the latest updates. In this new series of Kubota, Neo Star A211S, A211SN, B24640S, B24640SN, B27640S and B27640SN are included in the series. In the first sight, the premium design of the tractors and the compact look are very impressive. To work easily in a less space, the tractors have been specially designed to be narrow. This makes it a very useful use in orchard and vineyard farming. Neo Star series is specially designed for vineyard, sugarcane and inter cultivation farming. Vineyard, that is, in the field of grapes, there are very few places in the middle of the rose where large tractors are not able to work easily. In this way, the narrow models of Neo Star are easily operated in small places due to their low climb and shortest turning radius of 2.1 meters. This makes the tractor easily move in a less space and the crops are also less affected. In this farming, there is a need for narrow field operation and better traction. For this, a powerful 4WD drive system is given. In inter-culturation farming, field operation is often required. That is why Kubota has focused on the compact design, integrated power steering and comfortable operator platform. If we talk about the performance, then in the Neo Star series, Kubota's advanced ETVCS engine is given which gives smooth operation with low vibration and low noise. This engine gives better pickup and more torque, which can work easily in tractor tough farming conditions. Along with it, EcoPTO 540 and 750 RPM are given. Which gives better performance in sprayer applications with the help of fuel. The engine key stop feature is also given in this which allows the tractor to start and close the tractor from the key. Like you do in a car. Kubota has also focused on operator comfort. Adjustable and foldable suspension seat, integrated power steering and flat platform features give more comfort to the operator during long work time. In the same, 4WD drive system also provides better traction in weight and loose soil. This makes the work of the tractor easier. If we talk about the models, then in the Neo Star A211SN, it comes in 21 HP category in which you can see the 2.9 feet width of the vehicle. Whereas in the B-Choice 41S24HP, you can see the ground clearance of the 325mm. In the narrow model, you get a short turning radius of 2.1 meter and 2.98 meter width. In the B-Choice 41S24HP, the tractor has a super draft control and 750kg lift capacity. In the narrow model, you get a short turning radius of 2.1 meter which helps the heavy implementations to handle easily. Kubota has made these tractors for multiple applications. This tractor has a 750kg lift capacity with its sprayer, cultivator, rotawater and plow-like implementations. For easy maintenance, one piece is fully open bonnet which makes engine and battery access much easier. In addition, wet disc brakes, north forward, plus 3 reverse gears and 5 year warranty make this series even more powerful. By combining the new Kubota Neo Star series, we can take care of the needs of modern horticulture farming. Compact design, advanced Japanese technology, better comfort and powerful performance can be very beneficial for farmers in the coming season. You will get all the information about the tractor on the market. You can compare the tractor there. You can ask for insurance for the tractor. You can buy good equipment for your farm. Download the farm vehicle for all of these. The farm vehicle is better than expected. We will meet soon in the next tractor video. Jai Jawan, Jai Kisan.

page_content: Hello farmers! Today we are in Faridabad where Digitrack has launched three new tractors making their new and powerful all-black series stronger. There are five tractors displayed here. But today we will talk about the three new models PP41I, PP43I+, and PP640I 4WD which have just been launched and are ready to make the work of the farmers even easier and more powerful. Watch the video till the end and subscribe to the farming YouTube channel and press the bell icon for latest updates. First of all, if we talk about this all-black series then its design comes with a very premium and aggressive look. The whole black theme gives it a different identity whether it is farming or road presence these tractors attract attention from far away but not only looks but also performance is the same. Now let's talk about the first model PP41I. You get three cylinders in this 45 HP category tractor with a 2.7-liter engine which gives almost 41 HP PTO power. PTO power is quite good which can easily run rotawaters and cultivator-like implements. It has a torque of around 110-200 Nm which doesn't stop the engine even in heavy loads. Along with it, there are double clutch and 12 plus three constant mesh gearbox which is given with side shift which makes gear shifting smooth and easy. It has a hydraulic lifting capacity of up to 2000 kg which makes it even more versatile. Talking about the tyre size, you get a front tyre of 6.5-6. and rear tyre of 1428. You get sprinkler oil immersed brakes and you also get a heat guard for safety. Now let's move on to the second model. PP41I Plus This model is an upgrade version of power and performance. It has a 3-cylinder, 3.5-liter engine which is of 22 HP category. It has a great PTO HP of 43 HP and it has a torque of 230 Nm which is considered quite strong for heavy duty work. It also has the same reliable double clutch system and 12 plus three gearboxes. It also has a hydraulic lift capacity of 2000 kg which can easily handle big implements. Talking about the tyre size, you get front tyre of 7.5-6. and rear tyre of 1428. You get sprinkler oil immersed brakes and you also get a heat guard for safety. If you do heavy farming from the medium, this tractor can be a strong option. Now let's talk about the powerful and special model. PP640I 4WD As it is known as clear, you get 4-wheel drive in this model which gives a better grip in tough and slippery conditions. It has a 4-cylinder, 3.6-liter engine which is of 55 HP category. You get a great PTO HP of 46 HP. It has a torque of 247 Nm which is considered perfect for heavy duty farming, loader work and tough terrain. PTO is quite strong which can run multiple implements efficiently. Because of 4WD, its stability and pulling power are both great. Now let's talk about common features. You get power steering in these 3 tractors which makes you less tired to work long. LED headlamps increase visibility at night and a comfortable seat is a large platform which makes the operator comfortable. Also, MRPTO, Heat Shield, Company fitted bumper and features like tow hook make it more practical. Another special thing is the ground clearance and turning radius of these tractors. Due to high ground clearance, tractor runs smoothly in uneven fields. And it is easier to maneuver in small fields by less turning radius. Speed also goes up to 35-49 kmph which makes transport work faster. So farmers, these were the 3 great tractors launched on Digitrack. They are great to see and they are also great in performance. If you are thinking of buying a new tractor, then this all-black series should be in your shortlist. If you like the video, then like it. Subscribe to the channel and tell us in the comments which tractor you liked the most among these 3 tractors. See you in the next video. Till then, Jai Kisan! If you like the video, then like the video, subscribe to the channel, press the bell icon and share the video with your farmers and friends.

page_content: Hello, farmers! Welcome to the episode 32 of the Furniture and Car Present Tractor Talk Season. In Tractor Talk, we, farmers, answer the questions asked. In Tractor Talk, one or two more farmers gave a very wonderful response, which is thanks to their farmers. Tractor Talk Season 1 and 2 will answer the questions asked by the farmers in this season. I, Shivam, will try to answer your questions today. So, let's start today's episode. Watch the video till the end and subscribe to the Khetigadi YouTube channel and press the bell icon for the latest updates. Today's first question is from us, Guru Charan Ji. When will the Farm-Track 50 Pro Max 4-wheel drive come? Greetings, sir. If we talk, then the company has given the 4-wheel drive option, but it is only available in the models from 49 HP to 140 HP. There has not been any model launch of 50 HP in this series so the question is not whether the Pro Max 4WD will be available in 50 HP. It is clear that the Pro Max series comes with 4WD, but the 50 HP version is not available in the market yet. It is possible that the company may think about the 50 HP model launch, but there is no official news yet. We will definitely review our Khetigadi YouTube channel as soon as it comes. Sir, should Swaraj drive the 855 tractor in the 4th medium gear? Please answer my question, sir. I need your answer. Greetings, sir. It is absolutely right to drive the tractor in the 4th medium gear in the Swaraj 855FI. But it depends on the work and condition. If you are working lightly, such as driving a cultivator, or taking a light trolley or a dry and clean ground, then using the 4th medium gear is considered normal and safe. But if you are working heavy, such as a rotavator, deep jet or driving a load of more than a load trolley, then it is not right to drive the tractor in this gear. Because it is more pressure on the engine, the clutch plate can be damaged quickly and the performance of the tractor also decreases. So always keep in mind that if the engine starts to sound or the sound starts to change, then the gear should be reduced immediately. It is clear that the 4th medium gear is correct, but it should be used only in a light and correct condition. Our next question is, how much RPM is left for the work of the PTO? For example, for the jet, for the threshing. Some people say that 2100 to 2200 RPM is correct. Is this correct? PTO, power take-off. It is very important to keep the correct RPM for the work. Only then does the machine work in the right way and does not much return on the tractor. In most tractors, the PTO standard is 540 RPM, which is usually around 1,700 to 1,900 RPM on the engine. description:
क्या आप भी छोटे खेतों या बागानों (Orchards) के लिए सबसे संकरे (Narrow) ट्रैक्टर की तलाश में हैं? Kubota ने लॉन्च कर दिया है अपनी नई NeoStar Series 2026, जो जापानी टेक्नोलॉजी और दमदार इंजन के साथ आती है! इस वीडियो में हम जानेंगे Kubota NeoStar के सभी नए फीचर्स, ट्रैक्टर की कीमत और यह कैसे गन्ने की खेती या बागवानी में आपके काम को आसान बनाएगा।

Kubota NeoStar Series Launch 2026
A211S-N, B2441S-N, B2741S-N Mini Tractors

🚜 इस वीडियो में हमने कवर किया है:
Engine & Power: जापानी तकनीक वाला शानदार 21 HP से 27 HP का दमदार इंजन
Design: दुनिया के सबसे संकरे ट्रैक्टर की पूरी जानकारी (मात्र ~3 फीट चौड़ाई)
Features: पावर स्टीयरिंग और फ्यूल सेविंग (Eco PTO) की खासियत
Price: Kubota NeoStar मॉडल की ऑन-रोड कीमत

title: नये रूप में आ गए है New Holland के ये ट्रैक्टर New Holland 3032 Smart and New Holland  3600
description:
नमस्ते दोस्तों!
आज के इस वीडियो में हम बात करने वाले हैं किसान भाइयों के पसंदीदा ब्रांड New Holland के दो शानदार ट्रैक्टर्स के बारे में। कंपनी ने अपने 3032 TX Smart और 3600 TX मॉडल को नए अवतार और बेहतरीन फीचर्स के साथ पेश किया है।
इस वीडियो में हम इन दोनों ट्रैक्टर्स की पावर, माइलेज, कीमत और नए बदलावों के बारे में विस्तार से जानेंगे।

वीडियो में मुख्य जानकारी (Video Highlights):

New Holland 3032 TX Smart: यह 37 HP श्रेणी का एक दमदार ट्रैक्टर है। इसमें 2365 CC का इंजन मिलता है जो 137.4 Nm का जबरदस्त टॉर्क पैदा करता है। इसकी Lift-O-Matic तकनीक और 6 साल की वारंटी इसे छोटे और मध्यम किसानों के लिए सबसे स्मार्ट विकल्प बनाती है।

New Holland 3600 TX : यह 50 HP कैटेगरी का बादशाह है। इसमें FPT S8000 इंजन और Double Clutch जैसे आधुनिक फीचर्स दिए गए हैं। इसकी 1700-1800 किलोग्राम की भारी लिफ्टिंग क्षमता इसे रोटावेटर और थ्रेशर जैसे भारी उपकरणों के लिए परफेक्ट बनाती है।

नया रूप और डिजाइन: दोनों ट्रैक्टर्स अब नए ग्राफिक्स, बेहतर एलईडी लाइट्स और आरामदायक ऑपरेटर सीट के साथ आते हैं।

प्रमुख तकनीकी विशेषताएं (Specifications):

फीचर्स New Holland 3032 TX Smart New Holland 3600
HP श्रेणी -- 37 HP                                 --50 HP
इंजन क्षमता 2365 CC                                 --2931 CC
PTO पावर 33 HP                                     --46 HP
गियरबॉक्स 8 Forward + 2 Reverse --8F+2R / 12F+3R
लिफ्ट क्षमता 1100 KG 1700                       -- 1800 KG
वारंटी 6 साल / 6000 घंटे                         -- 6 साल / 6000 घंटे

कीमत की जानकारी (Expected Price):
New Holland 3032 TX Smart: ₹5.40 लाख* (एक्स-शोरूम) से शुरू।
New Holland 3600 TX: ₹7.99 लाख* (एक्स-शोरूम) से शुरू।

(नोट: कीमतें आपके राज्य और शहर के अनुसार अलग-अलग हो सकती हैं, सही कीमत के लिए नजदीकी डीलर से संपर्क करें।)

अगर आपको यह वीडियो पसंद आए तो Like करें, अपने किसान मित्रों के साथ Share करें और खेती-बाड़ी से जुड़ी ऐसी ही जानकारी के लिए हमारे चैनल को Subscribe करना न भूलें!
